positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical mandala pattern featuring interconnected cosmic florals and constellations. The central motif is a giant, bioluminescent lotus flower, composed of intricate geometric line work and detailed celestial elements, such as stylized nebulae and shooting stars forming delicate petals. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and metallic gold accents against a deep midnight background. The style must be Neo-Psychedelic Art meets Polynesian tattoo flash, rendered with extremely crisp lines and perfect symmetry. The composition should be flawlessly central and ready for direct use on apparel fabric. High contrast, perfect silhouette, clean linework, deep depth of field, volumetric lighting, intricate engraving details.
negative: blurry, noisy, messy, deformed, bad anatomy, amateur, sketch, cropped, lowres, watermark, signature, text, logos, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
